summary: Verified scroll behavior bug fix in ADLTrack app. The critical fix removes useEffect hooks that caused pages to freeze/jump when interacting with elements. PASSED: All 5 tabs work on both dashboards, clicking elements while scrolled does NOT jump to top, tab switching correctly scrolls to top, sub-page navigation correctly scrolls to top with working back buttons.
passed_tests: CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - All 5 bottom nav tabs (Home, Incident, Message, Shifts, Menu) clickable and switch content correctly
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - Menu sub-pages: Profile, Medications, Shift History, Settings, Support - all open correctly
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - Sub-page back buttons work correctly (meds-back-btn, etc.)
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - CRITICAL: Scrolling down (400px) and clicking task card does NOT jump to top (scroll stayed at 487)
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - CRITICAL: Clicking vitals card while scrolled does NOT jump to top
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - Tab switching CORRECTLY scrolls to top (scroll went from 494 to 0)
CAREGIVER DASHBOARD - Sub-page opening CORRECTLY scrolls to top
FAMILY DASHBOARD - All 5 bottom nav tabs (Home, Incident, Message, Alerts, Menu) clickable and switch content correctly
FAMILY DASHBOARD - Menu sub-pages: Care Plan, Weekly Report, Current Caregiver, Settings, Support - all open correctly
FAMILY DASHBOARD - Sub-page back buttons work (care-plan-back, weekly-report-back, caregiver-page-back)
FAMILY DASHBOARD - Tab switching CORRECTLY scrolls to top
FAMILY DASHBOARD - Sub-page opening CORRECTLY scrolls to top

bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Removed useEffect hooks that had [activeTab, activePage, ...] dependencies causing window.scrollTo(0,0) on every state change. Replaced with dedicated handleTabChange and handlePageChange functions that call scrollTo only on explicit user navigation.
code_locations: CaregiverDashboard.jsx lines 69-79: handleTabChange and handlePageChange functions
FamilyDashboard.jsx lines 46-56: handleTabChange and handlePageChange functions
CaregiverDashboard.jsx line 780: bottom nav uses handleTabChange
FamilyDashboard.jsx line 788: bottom nav uses handleTabChange
Both dashboards: sub-page onBack callbacks use handlePageChange(null)

critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: useEffect with scroll dependency correctly removed and replaced with dedicated handler functions
Code is clean - handleTabChange/handlePageChange pattern is appropriate for controlled navigation
No inline require() calls found in FamilyDashboard.jsx (properly imported at top of file lines 14-17)

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend only test - all data mocked)

No backend API calls - all data is local state

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scroll behavior bug fix verified. Key test pattern: Navigate to dashboard, scroll down using window.scrollTo(), click interactive element, verify scroll position did not change significantly. Tab switches and sub-page navigation SHOULD scroll to top. Key data-testids: nav-home, nav-incident, nav-chat, nav-shift, nav-settings for Caregiver; nav-home, nav-incident, nav-chat, nav-notifications, nav-settings for Family. Menu sub-pages: menu-profile, menu-medications, menu-shift-history, menu-settings, menu-support for Caregiver; Care Plan, Weekly Report, Current Caregiver, Settings, Support for Family.
